rental.headline: Proud family home
rental.description:
Situated in the family friendly suburb of Bonner, this stunning family home has been designed and built with style and comfort in mind. Set among other quality homes, this ideal property with attractive street appeal boasts a large open plan living area with a generously sized kitchen leading out to a large outdoor alfresco area perfect for entertaining family and friends.
With its close proximity to Bonner playing fields, Neville Bonner Primary, and local shops, this beautiful home is great for young families or couples.
Features Include: - Functional kitchen overlooking the dining and patio areas - 3.2Kw Solar on Roof with rebate to be provided to tenant, saving hundreds of dollars a year - Dedicated Study Nook near kitchen - Floorboards in Kitchen, Meals and living areas - Segregated Carpeted Family Room - Comfortable living space and meals area leading out to Alfresco Deck and landscaped garden - Ducted Vacuuming - Alarm System and Front Door intercom - Reverse cycle air-conditioning throughout - Seperate laundry with external access - Internal garage access - Located close to transport, shopping, bars, restaurants, business district, schools and professional hubs -This property is exempt from ceiling insulation standards. - EER not available

rental.headline: Welcome to the Perfect Rental Retreat!
rental.description:
Nestled in a serene neighborhood, this 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom house is the epitome of comfort and convenience.
🍽️ Whip up Culinary Delights: The modern kitchen boasts ample bench-space, a dishwasher for hassle-free cleanup, a gas cooktop for precision cooking, and an electric oven to bake up your favorites
Bask in Natural Beauty: Step into the enchanting courtyard, offering a harmonious blend of outdoor living and tranquility. It's the perfect spot for morning coffee, lazy afternoons, or even starlit dinners.
Your Oasis Awaits: Retreat to the private main bedroom with its very own ensuite for that extra touch of luxury and seclusion.
Stay Cozy All Year Round: Experience the ultimate comfort with ducted gas heating, ensuring a warm and inviting ambiance no matter the weather.
Fresh & Inviting: The house has been freshly painted throughout, creating an inviting canvas for you to make it your own.
Enjoy the Outdoors: A small backyard provides a green space to indulge your gardening requirements.
Parking Made Easy: With a single car garage offering internal access, your convenience is our priority.
Embrace convenience: Located in close proximity to transportation hubs, parks, ovals, and shopping centres, everything you need is just a stone's throw away.

The open-plan living and dining area is bright and welcoming, flowing seamlessly to a private courtyard ideal for relaxing or entertaining. The kitchen features plenty of storage and bench space along with quality appliances.
Three generously sized bedrooms, all with built-in wardrobes, including a master bedroom with ensuite. The home also includes a single garage with internal access.

rental.description:
Welcome to 120/2 Windjana Street, Harrison – a stylish and low-maintenance one-bedroom apartment with study located in a sought-after complex, perfect for professionals or couples looking for comfort and convenience.
This light-filled apartment features an open-plan living and dining area that flows seamlessly onto a private balcony, perfect for relaxing or entertaining. The kitchen is equipped with quality appliances, and ample storage.
Spacious bedrooms and one has direct access to the modern bathroom. Additional features include split-system air conditioning, a European laundry, and a secure basement car space with storage.

rental.headline: Quiet and convenient - Partially Furnished
rental.description:
Looking for a modern and convenient apartment in Turner? Look no further than this partially furnished one bedroom, one bathroom gem located on the second floor at Eldon.
With its prime location just steps from the light rail, Canberra Centre and Australian National University, this apartment is perfect for those who want to be in the heart of the action. Whether you're a student, young professional or simply looking for a comfortable home, this apartment has it all.
Inside, you'll find an updated kitchen with European laundry, opening out to the living space which is partially furnished. Accommodation is provided by a generously sized bedroom with study area. The renovated bathroom is sleek and stylish, featuring modern fixtures and finishes.
Features: - Near new carpets - Renovated kitchen and bathroom - European style laundry - Generously sized bedroom and living space - Separate study nook - Partially furnished - 500 meters from the Canberra Centre and Braddon - 7 minute walk to the Australian National University - 4 minute walk to the Elouera Street light rail stop - Applicants to seek permission to keep pets - EER unavailable - Available 16 October 2023

rental.headline: Fantastic 1 Bedroom Apartment Awaiting You
One of the Best 1 Bedroom Apartment in the area - Partially Furnished
rental.description:
This one bedroom apartment is not to be missed. Set on the ground floor of the modern 'Mondrian' complex, this one bedroom apartment offers generous living spaces, superb kitchen and is positioned perfectly, with one of the best gardens you have seen in the inner city creating wonderful peaceful moments.
Ideal for a single person or couple alike. With all the creature comforts, including modern kitchen, granite bench-tops, dishwasher, gas cooking, electric oven and range-hood. Other features include reverse cycle air conditioning and separate laundry with clothes dryer.
The spacious bedroom has built in robes, separate courtyard with outside access. The bathroom is centrally located and is very modern.
The location is also second to none, perfectly located only minutes to the heart of the city and the Braddon precinct with bustling cafes, restaurants and shopping. Walking distance to the ANU and transport.
To top it all off, the property comes semi-furnished.

rental.headline: Expansive family home
rental.description:
The owners of this thoughtfully designed and beautifully crafted five bedroom executive residence have gone to incredible lengths to create a unique home of quality, style and comfort. The style and quality inclusions of this fabulous custom built family home ensures that you will not find another property just like this one!
The masterfully thought-out floor plan and tastefully finished home sets the mark for family accommodation, offering up space and comfort for all members. Expansive space and comfortability are a hallmark of this stunning home, you are met with soaring high ceilings that give off an immediate sense of grandeur and light.
Boasting five large bedrooms, a spacious open plan kitchen/living area with seperate formal lounge and a fully equipped rumpus room with kitchenette, there is a space for everyone to disperse across. Entertaining is a breeze, with a functional alfresco area, featuring stunning views to Telstra Tower.
Complementing the convenience of the location, the property is only few minutes walk to schools, childcare centres, a chemist, 24/7 Club Lime gym and Coombs shops. The fantastic location of this property offers approximately 10-15 minutes drive to Canberra City Centre, ANU, Belconnen, Barton, Woden and moments to Cooleman Court Shops.
Features include: - Modern, light filled home - Master bedroom with ensuite, walk in robe and access to alfresco - Rumpus with attached bathroom, kitchenette and external access - Separate formal lounge room and/or second rumpus room - Large living and dining area with raked ceilings and access to Alfresco - Contemporary Kitchen with stone bench top, gas cooking and walk in pantry - Alfresco deck with stunning views to valley and Telstra Tower - 2 large linen cupboards and plenty of storage cupboards - Landscaped outdoor living - Double lock up garage with remote door and internal access - Central Reverse Cycle Heating Cooling for main house and Split system Reverse cycle unit for Rumpus - Energy Efficient Heat Pump for Hot Water System - Enclosed backyard - Playground and park across the road perfect for kids to burn off steam - Security system and energy efficient LED lights throughout the home - Smart Wiring to all entertaining areas and study - Ducted vacuum - Close to arterial roads - Minutes to Coombs shops, schools, playgrounds and bike tracks - Applicants to seek permission to keep pets - EER not available - PARTIALLY FURNISHED is required. - Available 10 December 2024 - Property complies with the insulation legislation.

rental.headline: Fantastic Two Bedroom in the Heart of Gungahlin
rental.description:
This spacious apartment is located amidst the convenience of Gungahlin Town Centre, offers a quaint living space for those who enjoy having everything they need right at their fingertips. With Big W, Coles and The Commonwealth Bank just down the street and the delectable dining experiences of Crust Pizza, Kokora Japanese and more within just a minute or two walk, this home truly does provide a fantastic lifestyle for university students, young professionals and modern couples.
Upon entering the apartment, the open plan living, dining and kitchen zone is surprisingly spacious, with immaculate tiling in the kitchen and easy to maintain hard flooring throughout.
The kitchen also features a modern electric cooktop with built-in oven, ample storage space in the form of airy cupboards and drawers and plenty of bench space for storing appliances or carrying out food prep.

rental.headline: Outstanding 2 Bedroom (Plus Study) Unit and Fully Furnished
rental.description:
Fully Furnished
Centrally located and just a stroll to all the amenities the area has to offer, this delightful two-bedroom plus study unit in the popular 'ASTIN' complex is sure to please.
As you enter the unit you are greeted with an open plan area with plenty of space on offer. The kitchen is well positioned and its functional design includes electric cooktop, range-hood, sink, dishwasher, electric oven, built in microwave, storage with plenty of bench space on the 20mm granite bench-top. The living/dining area flows from the kitchen and is a good size. Off this area, a good size enclosed and private study awaits for those wanting some quiet space to work or enjoy. There is a covered outdoor balcony of the family that is ideal for a bbq and outdoor living.
The large main bedroom suitably comes off the living area. It has a walk through robe, plenty of natural light, and a well-proportioned ensuite. The other bedroom is equipped with built in robes and can accommodate large bedroom furniture.
The main bathroom is accommodated with a vanity and plenty of bench space, separate shower and toilet. The laundry is neatly tucked away behind concealed doors.
The unit has beautiful carpets and freshly painted neutral tones throughout. The two allocated underground car spaces with storage cage is conveniently located under the complex accessed via a lift.
The body corporate is building a new gym which the tenants will have access to once completed.
. The property has direct access to the light rail, bus stop, café’s, restaurants, retail outlets and grocery shopping. It is also very close to licensed clubs, department stores, banks, schools, arterial roads and the list is endless.

Set at the back of the modern 'Synergy' complex, this three bedroom, two bathroom townhouse offers generous living spaces and is positioned perfectly, giving you peace and quiet while still being close to everything that the Gungahlin area has to offer.

rental.headline: Private. Leafy. Quiet - A Must See
rental.description:
This well cared for and loved apartment in the boutique “Elan” complex is a must see. The successful tenant will enjoy its gorgeous leafy outlook and excellent location. Featuring a similar amount of floorspace to some two bedroom apartments on the market, this one bedroom plus study nook apartment is cleverly designed to maximise usable space, and as a result feels spacious and open. Presented in excellent condition, just move in and enjoy Lyneham’s envious lifestyle of tree-lined streets, cafes, bars and green spaces.
Features: * 1 bedroom plus versatile study nook, 1 bathroom. * Beautiful leafy view from the lounge and bedroom through wide, full height windows. * Generous dimensions in every room and balcony. * Access to the balcony from bedroom and lounge room. * Reverse cycle air conditioner. * Inbuilt wardrobes in bedroom. * Floor to ceiling tiles in bathroom. * European laundry with dryer and custom shelving. * Caesarstone bench-top and Bosch appliances. * Large pantry. * Sunscreen and blockout roller blinds. * Security front door. * 2 car spaces and storage cage in secure shared garage. * CAT5 cabling to all rooms. * Well built and maintained complex. * Established shared gardens with mature trees. * Pool and common paved areas suitable for entertaining. * Community garden with plots available to rent. * Body corporate allows pets. * Next door to Old Canberra Inn, arguably the best pub in Canberra. * Close to Tilley’s, The Front, O’Connor Ridge, Lyneham wetlands, light rail, Dickson shops and restaurants. * Bus stop to city on doorstep. * 15 min cycle to city or ANU along excellent bike paths.
- Pets subject to approval - EER 5.5 - This property complies with the ACT ceiling insulation standard - Available 31st of January 2025
Don't let this opportunity slip away - seize the chance to make this remarkable property your sanctuary, where practicality, elegance, and eco-conscious living converge seamlessly.

rental.headline: One of the Best 2 Bedroom Unit in the Area
This Is Not Your Standard Apartment
rental.description:
The moment you set foot in this delightful two-storey ground-floor one-bedroom + study apartment within Barton's sought-after Realm Park complex, you are struck by its distinctive charm and character.
The apartment's thoughtful architecture, generous dimensions and high-quality fittings and finishes have been beautifully enhanced with additional design features and finishes, including stunning floor-to-ceiling timber shelving over two levels, to provide it with a warm, inviting and somewhat eclectic ambience.
On its ground level, this immaculate apartment has a spacious open-plan living and dining area, a premium kitchen and a powder room. The spotless kitchen is equipped with stainless steel Miele appliances, quality stone bench tops and soft close cabinets and has ample storage. Floor-to-ceiling full-width glazing results in an abundance of natural light and includes sliding doors providing access to an east-facing courtyard.
A beautiful open timber stair case provides access to the apartment's upper level, where there is a roomy east-facing bedroom with good-sized built-in wardrobe and floor-to ceiling full-width glazing, a generous study area, a sleek, well-appointed, marble-accented bathroom and a large, separate laundry with tub and clothes dryer.
Down in the building's secure basement, the apartment has a well-located single parking space with adjacent enclosed storage. There is also bicycle parking in the basement.
The location of this outstanding apartment - the Realm Precinct - is also second to none. The precinct is a stylish mixed-use area with a little bit of everything. On the apartment's doorstep are an array of professional, medical and specialty retail services, as well as five-star hotels, gyms and health spas, funky cafes and bars, and some of Canberra's best restaurants. But the modest scale of the Precinct means it is still a pleasant place in which to live.
Of course, its location in the heart of Barton, recognised as Canberra's most 'liveable' suburb, means the Realm Precinct is in close proximity to the best Canberra has to offer. Perched on the edge of the Parliamentary Triangle and a stone's throw from Lake Burley Griffin, it is just minutes to the CBD, Braddon, Russell, lively Kingston Foreshore, eclectic Old Kingston and charming Manuka Village.
The Realm Precinct also has good access to transport, being adjacent to the Gold Line and two blocks away from the Red Rapid and Green Rapid services - so no more arduous commuting and paid parking!
This stand-out apartment is vacant, so its many charms and conveniences are ready to be enjoyed. Don't delay in viewing it.
Key features: - Quiet, easterly aspect - Generous open-plan living and dining area opening to courtyard - Premium kitchen with quality European appliances - Spacious east-facing upper-level bedroom with generous wardrobe - Separate study - Well-appointed, marble-accented bathroom - Separate laundry - Downstairs powder room - Ample internal storage - Ducted heating and cooling - 6-star energy efficiency rating - Secure basement parking spaces with adjacent storage - EER not available for this property -Available 3rd July 2024

rental.headline: A contemporary, convenient home
rental.description:
Those looking for a contemporary and comfortable apartment in a central location are sure to be impressed by this wonderful one-bedroom one-bathroom abode.
Inside you'll find modern finishes and fixtures throughout as well as reverse cycle heating and cooling to keep you comfortable year-round.
The kitchen has all that you could need including stainless steel appliances, stylish soft closing cabinetry, sweeping bench-tops, and from here opens to the living and dining room. Sliding glass doors lead you outside to the balcony, a perfect spot to enjoy your morning coffee or an evening meal at the end of the day.
The bedroom is a great size and has two built-in robes, and in the bathroom you'll be delighted to see floor-to-ceiling tiles and a large shower. There is a car space with a storage cage that add further convenience to this fantastic apartment.
The ideal location places you within a short distance of a great selection of restaurants, bars and cafes. Local parks, galleries and shops are also close by, as is the light rail.

rental.headline: Luxurious Living In Realm
rental.description:
Luxurious living in the Realm complex on Sydney Avenue, only steps from the Capital's leading attractions and services. Located in Canberra's foremost suburb Barton, the heart of Canberra's leafy Inner South, this stunning and spacious fully furnished one bedroom apartment on the fourth floor, offers a peaceful and leafy outlook, with full length windows leading to the alfresco balcony. This apartment is complimented by a spacious bedroom with ensuite, and open plan living area with study nook.
The state-of-the-art design is elevated by timeless décor consisting of marble features, high ceilings and quality fittings and fixtures throughout. Canberra Parliamentary Triangle, Manuka Village, Kingston Foreshore plus Russell Business Precinct, all within a very short distance. Not to mention the benefits of living in the prestigious Realm Precinct with doorstep access to world-class dining, fitness, healthcare, beauty and professional services.
- Fully furnished apartment within the “Realm”, located on level 4 - Designer kitchen with Miele appliances including induction cooktop, dishwasher and oven, stone benchtops, generous pantry - Study nook - Generous bedroom with built-in robes - Balcony with glass balustrade - Reverse cycle heating and cooling - Voice intercom, elevator access, basement garaging with storage cage - 72sqm living, 7sqm balcony - Walking distance to Barton offices - Minutes to Canberra Centre, Kingston and Manuka - EER unknown

rental.headline: Outstanding 4 Bedroom Plus Study Family Home
rental.description:
Highly private with excellent outdoor entertaining spaces and deluxe modern appointments throughout, this immaculate four bedroom family home provides a life of superb privacy, tranquillity and convenience. The heart of the home is in the form of a large, open plan kitchen and living area, perfect for entertaining. A separate lounge to the front of the home offers additional space for the growing family.
The suburb of Moncrieff is conveniently located to allow easy access to a range of facilities including a number of local parks, walking trails & the 'One Tree Hill' lookout. Not to mention having the ever popular recreation park to entertain all ages. The Gungahlin Town Centre is also only minutes away and provides a whole host of further amenities.

rental.headline: Executive living at Midnight- Semi Furnished
rental.description:
Midnight stands tall as a single address. Inspired exterior facades deliver two rich facets of modern Canberra seamlessly in one extraordinary design. Cast your gaze eastward to Mort Street and beyond and be immersed in the intoxicating creative energy of Braddon’s iconic Lonsdale Street, with a distinctly more creative facade sending the boldest of expressions to the street.
This executive one bedroom apartment offers the lifestyle and luxury of Inner City living. The thoughtfully designed floor plan incorporates a stylish kitchen complete with stone bench tops and stainless steel European appliances, an open plan living area, generously proportioned bedroom with built in storage plus a private entertaining alfresco area that effortlessly creates flexible spaces between indoor and outdoor living. Additional features include reverse cycle air conditioning, security intercom system, double glazed windows and secure basement parking with storage.

rental.headline: Fully Furnished apartment in the heart of Canberra
rental.description:
This Harry Seidler-designed apartment in leafy Campbell, with views of Black Mountain Tower and beyond, has everything you need with none of the stress.
Walking distance to Civic, Russell, Lake Burley Griffin and Mount Ainslie, and only a short drive to Barton, Kingston and the Airport, this recently renovated apartment is perfect for anyone looking for convenience and comfort in the heart of Canberra. rental.headline: This Property Has It All - Won't Last Long
rental.description:
Do you enjoy your privacy, then this is your next rental property. With four-bedrooms and one-bathrrom this property will be a perfect home for you. And there’s an added bonus – two separate approved studios, which would make a fantastic home office, music room, teenagers retreat or games area.
All situated on a large, private block with established gardens, this family haven offers a sense of peace and tranquillity. The main home boasts hardwood floors and year-round comfort with ducted gas heating, reverse cycle split system, ceiling fans and slow combustion fireplaces.
Each bedroom features built-in robes and carpeted flooring. The bathroom has recently been updated and includes a second toilet.
The fully renovated kitchen is a chef’s dream, with plenty of storage and preparation space, induction cook top, as new oven, dishwasher, glass splash, matte black double sink, large pantry, and breakfast bar with wine storage.
The backyard is fantastic, with a large paved outdoor entertaining area, pizza oven, fireplace, 5000L water tank, veggie gardens, dog run, and chicken coup, you will want to spend the whole day outside.
Features include:
• Lovely family retreat on a large, private block with established grounds • Three-bedroom family home plus two separate approved studios, ideal for a home office or teenagers retreat • Renovated kitchen with induction cook top, as-new oven, dishwasher, glass splash and large pantry • Built-in robes in all bedrooms • Updated bathroom including second toilet • Hardwood flooring and carpet • French timber doors from living to front patio • Slow combustion fireplaces inside and out • Ducted gas heating, split system and ceiling fans • Various outdoor entertaining options • Double attached carport plus single carport • Colourbond fencing, garden shed • 5000L water tank, dog run, chicken coup, pizza oven, fire pit, veggie garden and more

rental.description:
DKSN is brilliantly located right next to the tram, Access Canberra, Daramalan College and the abundance of amenities that is Dickson dining and shopping precinct. Leave the car at home and walk to enjoy some of Canberra's very best restaurants and cafes in the bustling Dickson.
Carefully considered, the layout of this residence creates a space that is functional, comfortable, and contemporary. The layout offers spacious living, a modern and minimalist kitchen, featuring stone benchtops, an integrated fridge, European appliances, and smart storage solutions, and engineered timber floorboards throughout the living area.
DKSN takes inner city living in Canberra to a whole new level. Amidst the energetic buzz of this new CBD, brilliantly designed apartments allow you to enjoy all the action, whilst having a quiet sanctuary to retreat to each day. Be sure to get in quick to bring your dreams of luxury living, well within reach.

Located within the 'Malabar Apartments' in the heart of Dickson is this sophisticated one bedroom apartment. Displaying a functional floorplan with an abundance of natural light and oversized kitchen, complemented by views over Dickson out to Black Mountain Tower from the living room and balcony.
Malabar complex considered to be one of the best entertaining complexes with resort living in Dickson. A healthy lifestyle is at your doorstep with an indoor pool heated with rooftop view and a gym with a great outlook. This building also features a range of convenient shared facilities Communal outdoor barbecue facilities and entertaining area, to unwind at home cinema with lounge. Sit back with family and friends in the luscious gardens featuring stunning views to Black Mountain Tower.
Located in popular Cape Street which is close to public transport, Dickson & shops boasting boutique cafes, pubs and restaurants all within a moments stroll. Being in such a convenient location means you can leave the car at home and walk, catch a bus or hop on the light rail from the nearby Dickson interchange.

rental.headline: The apartment with the best views in town!
rental.description:
Welcome to the High Society building, where elegance meets convenience! We are delighted to present this stunning property for rent, offering an open plan living area with breathtaking 180-degree views. Located in a prime location, this apartment boasts numerous features and amenities that will make you feel like royalty.
Upon entering, you will be captivated by the spacious open plan living area, bathed in natural light and offering panoramic views of the surrounding cityscape. The modern design and thoughtful layout create a seamless flow, perfect for both relaxation and entertaining guests.
This apartment features two generously sized bedrooms, providing ample space for your comfort and privacy. The stylish bathroom and ensuite are elegantly appointed, ensuring a luxurious experience. Additionally, for your convenience, a clothes dryer is included, making laundry a breeze.
You will have the convenience of two restricted access car spaces, providing secure parking for you and your guests. The intercom access system adds an extra layer of security and peace of mind.
Step out onto your private balcony, where you can enjoy a cup of coffee or unwind after a long day while admiring the stunning vistas. The built-in storage ensures that you have ample space to keep your belongings organized, and there is also a storage cage for additional storage needs.
As a resident of the High Society building, you will have access to a range of high-quality amenities. Take a dip in the inviting pool on a hot summer day, or maintain your fitness routine in the well-equipped gym. The building has been designed to enhance your lifestyle and provide you with everything you need right at your doorstep.
Convenience is a key feature of this property. Located just moments away from the Belconnen Westfield, you will have easy access to a wide range of shopping options, as well as a variety of restaurants and bars, offering a vibrant dining and entertainment scene.
Don't miss the opportunity to live in this luxurious apartment and experience the epitome of sophisticated urban living. Contact us today to arrange a viewing and secure your place in the High Society building.
This property complies with the ACT ceiling insulation standard.

rental.headline: This is the place to live - City at your doorstep
This two-bedroom apartment is a rare find in such a perfect location.
rental.description:
The Metropol is a vibrant urban precinct that transforms the space between the City and Reid. Flanked by historic Glebe Park and the Canberra Centre across the road the precinct draws inspiration from Reids’s garden city legacy. It’s a connecting point between heritage, urban and nature.
The Metropol is located at the edge of the CBD, across the road from world-class shopping facilities at The Canberra Centre. From national department stores and brands to the cinema, everything is at your fingertips. You’re walking distance from a variety of eateries in the Melbourne and Sydney buildings, international performances at the Canberra Theatre, and events and exhibits at the Australian National University.
From your door, you’re just a short stroll from Braddon’s thriving entertainment district. Once an industrial area of car yards and services, Braddon is now brimming with cafes, bars and boutique shopping. Discover new delicacies with a range of cuisines and price points before heading to one of the buzzing bars. Visit the brewery, designer op shops, florists, barbers and homeware shops whenever you choose.

rental.headline: Stunning one bedroom apartment in Metropol
rental.description:
This stunning one bedroom, one bathroom apartment is located in the sought-after suburb of Reid, opposite Glebe Park and the Canberra Centre in the Metropol precinct.
Upon entering the apartment, you'll be greeted by a spacious open-plan meals and living area, perfect for entertaining guests or simply relaxing after a long day. The floor-to-ceiling windows flood the space with natural light, providing stunning views of the city skyline and parklands. The floating timber floorboards add a touch of warmth and character to the space, while the stone bench top in the kitchen provides a stylish and practical workspace.
The bedroom is generously proportioned and boasts built-in wardrobes, ensuring ample storage space for all your belongings. The bathroom is modern and stylish, with high-quality fixtures and fittings.
Located just minutes from some of Canberra's best restaurants, cafes, and boutique shops, you'll never run out of places to explore and enjoy. Public transport options are also conveniently located, making it easy to get around the city.

rental.headline: This is something special - don't miss out
rental.description:
The Metropol is a vibrant urban precinct that transforms the space between the City and Reid. Flanked by historic Glebe Park and the Canberra Centre across the road the precinct draws inspiration from Reids’s garden city legacy. It’s a connecting point between heritage, urban and nature.
The Metropol is located at the edge of the CBD, across the road from world-class shopping facilities at The Canberra Centre. From national department stores and brands to the cinema, everything is at your fingertips. You’re walking distance from a variety of eateries in the Melbourne and Sydney buildings, international performances at the Canberra Theatre, and events and exhibits at the Australian National University.
From your door, you’re just a short stroll from Braddon’s thriving entertainment district. Once an industrial area of car yards and services, Braddon is now brimming with cafes, bars and boutique shopping. Discover new delicacies with a range of cuisines and price points before heading to one of the buzzing bars. Visit the brewery, designer op shops, florists, barbers and homeware shops whenever you choose.

rental.headline: Stunning views in the heart of Belconnen
rental.description:
Enjoy luxury living and a contemporary lifestyle in the Nightfall complex within the heart of Belconnen.
This east facing two bedroom unit offers a minimalist setting with stylish, neutral tones throughout. Soak in the abundance of natural light, with striking views of the Black Mountain and Telstra Tower. The cosy living and kitchen area flows out to the balcony, inviting plenty of opportunities for relaxed living.
Nightfall residents have exclusive access to the entertainment kitchen and wine cellar, cinema, pool, and fully equipped gym. The vibrant Republic precinct hosts a variety of retail, commercial, food and beverage stores including Woolworths Metro, BWS, and the Abode Hotel Restaurant and Bar. Enjoy the short walks to Westfield Belconnen, Lake Ginninderra and Emu Bank restaurants and bars, Club Lime gym and swimming pool, and the University of Canberra.

rental.headline: Comfort and convenience at The Parade
rental.description:
'The Parade' in Campbell 5 offers sleek, modern, and high-end finishes. This near new two-bedroom home offers an open planned living space that opens onto a spacious balcony. With natural light soaking into the living area and balcony, it is the perfect space to enjoy your morning coffee or after work drinks with friends. Within walking distance from local cafes, gyms, Lake Burley Griffin, and Canberra's public transport, you can leave your car at home and enjoy the convenience The Parade has to offer.

rental.headline: Spacious & Convenient Townhouse in Mawson
rental.description:
Perfectly positioned just a short walk from the popular Mawson shops and only minutes from Woden Plaza, this ground-floor, three-bedroom townhouse offers a fantastic blend of convenience and lifestyle. Residents of this well-maintained complex can enjoy access to a large outdoor pool and tennis court, making it an excellent choice for those seeking both comfort and recreation.
Designed with functionality in mind, the home features two generous living spaces that open onto two private, low-maintenance courtyards—ideal for entertaining or relaxing. The full-sized kitchen is perfect for the home cook, boasting ample bench and cupboard space, along with a dishwasher for added convenience. The three well-sized bedrooms all include built-in robes, with the master enjoying a recently renovated ensuite.

rental.headline: Spacious, low maintenance home
rental.description:
Set in a quiet location with a northerly aspect this light filled home comprises of an open plan living and meals area that connects to the kitchen. Both living areas open out to both the front gardens and rear courtyard. The generous courtyard is a blank canvas, ready to be made into the perfect entertaining space.
Accommodation is provided by three large bedrooms, the main bedroom with ensuite for added convenience. Single garage and ample visitor parking make this home so easy to live in. The location is amazing, kids can ride their bicycles on the street or run up to the nearby park. This single level home is ideal, you can enjoy the garden, with enough room for family and friends.
This quiet location backs onto reserve that leads up to Isaacs shops, walking paths and mountain bike trails. It is a short stroll to the local shops, Canberra Hospital and Woden Town Centre is only moments away. It provides peace and quiet, yet for those with an active lifestyle there is so much at your fingertips.

rental.headline: Live the high life at Highgate
rental.description:
Setting new heights in luxury living the 'Highgate' complex is a testament to the continued vision of Canberra’s growth.
With the complex commanding views over Mt. Ainslie and central Canberra, These luxurious apartments feature exquisite contemporary styling, with a focus on quality and attention to detail. The Highgate complex is located in the heart of the city with shops, restaurants a park and even a Casino at your doorstep!
Unit 129 is located on the seventh floor, With amenities such as a pool, gym, theatre room and outdoor entertaining BBQ facilities this complex really does have it all.
With a spacious open plan living area which flows to a large balcony and a well-equipped kitchen with beautiful finishes and appliances, including a dishwasher. With two bedrooms, both with built in robes, the main with an ensuite and balcony access. There is also an internal European style laundry with both a washing machine and dryer, a single car space (located level 4) and storage cage.

This much loved home places you within a short walk of Kaleen Plaza, public transport and so much more and provides you with a great opportunity to move in to the ideal family home.

rental.headline: Renovated family oasis
rental.description:
Offering an open plan light-filled living space with lounge and dining, the home has superbly extended and renovated throughout. The renovations are something would see from a home magazine, thoughtfully considered design, high quality inclusions, custom cabinetry and a carefully selected colour scheme ensure each space offers impressive wow factor.
The master bedroom will become your private sanctuary from the moment you step inside, you will appreciate the level of detail that has gone into creating this magical space. The master bedroom finished with tiled feature wall, leading into the designer walk-in-robe and ensuite finished with modern inclusions. The ensuite overlooks an enclosed retaining wall ensuring privacy is assured.
The rear garden is spacious and the perfect space for the kids to play, grow your own vegetables, the options are endless. The home also offers a recently built covered 36.02m2 alfresco, fitted ceiling fans, lights, pizza oven and fully enclosed lockable store room.
Located in the heart of Farrer the current owners have thoroughly enjoyed the benefits of this wonderful and central location. Walking distance to Farrer Shops, local schools and some magnificent walking trails through the hills, perfect for those who love long walks or have dogs. The benefits of living in Farrer are simply endless.

rental.headline: Elevated living at Manhattan on the Park
rental.description:
Sitting high above on level nine sits this elegant apartment, ready for you to call home. Upon entering, you are greeted by an open-plan living and dining area with gorgeous double-glazed floor to ceiling windows that allow natural light to shine through and offer a delightful sense of space, calm and relaxation. This luxury apartment plays host to sleek cabinetry and storage options, high quality finishes, and stone bench tops.
The bedrooms have been thoughtfully designed with space and functionality in mind, offering plenty of wardrobe space and natural light whilst making the most of the floor space. Both bedrooms are serviced by modern, luxe bathrooms with high quality finishings.
The Manhattan is equipped with a number of amenities to be enjoyed solely by the occupants. Positioned on the 3rd floor, overlooking the leafy Glebe Park and beyond is a stunning outdoor area featuring a swimming pool, spa and gas BBQ’s making it the perfect location to enjoy the sunshine with friends and family. There is also a gym facility situated near the outdoor area which is fully equipped with machines, and free weights, all that you need for your workout routine.
Features include: - Sunny open-plan living & dining area - Intercom access - Ducted reverse-cycle air conditioning - Built-in Bosch stainless steel appliances, including dishwasher, microwave, oven & cooktop - Waterfall kitchen benchtop - Fisher & Paykel dryer - Facilities for residents, including swimming pool, spa & gym - Secure basement car space with storage cage - Walking distance to the Canberra Centre, Braddon, transport hubs and Glebe Park - Applicants to seek permission to keep pets - EER unavailable - Available now

rental.headline: An unrivalled lifestyle awaits

This oversized apartment has a truly unique touch, providing the space of a two bedroom unit with an industrial style fit out featuring high concrete ceilings and black framework. Large floor to ceiling glass doors open up and offers an extension of the living area in the form of a spacious winter garden, overlooking the lush Kingston back streets.
Perfectly located in the heart of Kingston, this one bedroom apartment offers a convenient lifestyle. It's one that's a walk to work in the Parliamentary Triangle, a Sunday morning spent at a local coffee shop such as Penny University or Local Press, followed by a walk around Lake Burley Griffin.
The Powerhouse complex stands tall as a single address. Inspired exterior facade delivers a rich facet of modern Canberra seamlessly in one extraordinary design. Cast your gaze around the area and beyond and be immersed in the intoxicating creative energy of Kingston Foreshore, with a distinctly more creative facade sending the boldest of expressions to the street.

rental.headline: Outstanding in Outtrim
rental.description:
Don't miss the opportunity to move into this functional 3 bedroom, 1 bathroom, 2 carpark home. Only a short drive to the Tuggeranong Town Centre, and across the road from the Calwell Neighbourhood Oval. As an added bonus you are also in close proximity to schools, cafe's, restaurants, parks, sports fields and shopping.

rental.headline: Braddon meets the Bronx in Branx
rental.description:
This stunning designer apartment is positioned in Canberra's development, 'Branx', in the heart of Lonsdale Street Braddon. A beautifully constructed building with distinctive facade, the apartment offers high-level finishes, luxurious inclusions and built to an exceptional standard. The cosmopolitan lifestyle afforded by this position is sure to impress. Cafes, restaurants, bars and retail offerings all located from your door.
Rising boldly from the Braddon streetscape, the Branx, developed by Australian company, Bulum Group and designed by Canberra’s Judd Studio, is the tangible product of a reimagined Braddon. Inspired by New York’s Dream Downtown Hotel and Judd Studios Curtin Conservatory project, the façade displays a playful series of elliptic shapes, bordered by climbing vines. The portico, a series of origami, folded panels, shelters and shades the independent, cafés and shops that occupy the street level.
Floating oak floors, a crisp white palette, timber cabinetry and vibrant aluminium doors create a polished and pristine sensation throughout. The open plan kitchen, dining, living lead to a an oversized balcony with glass balustrade, providing seamless indoor/outdoor flow, light and aspect. Two generously sized bathrooms are serviced by modern, chic bathrooms featuring matte black appliances and mosaic tiles, tying in with the modern vintage theme throughout the unit.
Features include: - Spacious 2 bedroom apartment in the Branx designed by Judd Studio - Open living and dining area with two walls of windows/sliding doors to balcony - Galley style kitchen with porcelain recessed sink in kitchen with caroma tap-ware & accessories, pantry and abundant cabinetry - Pressed metal splash-backs, stone bench-tops and designer Laminex cabinetry - Smeg gas 4 x burner cook top and oven - Ensuite with walk in shower, mirrored medicine cabinet and vanity storage - Second bedroom with mirrored built-in robe - Main bathroom with floor to ceiling tiling, rain shower, vanity and additional storage - Floating oak flooring - Laminated windows and sliding doors for acoustic privacy (double glazed) - Split system inverter heating/cooling - 1 car space (small car only) - Walking distance to shops, bars and restaurants - 5 minute walk to Canberra Centre - Applicants to seek permission to keep pets - EER unknown - Property meets the standard requirements for installation - Available 23rd of December 2024

rental.headline: Peaceful living in Gordon
rental.description:
This spacious townhouse boasts two separate living areas, providing ample space for both relaxation and entertainment. The updated kitchen features modern appliances and plenty of storage space, making it the perfect spot for preparing meals for family and friends.
Step outside onto the covered deck, where you can enjoy al fresco dining or simply take in the beautiful surroundings. The fenced backyard provides privacy and security for both kids and pets, making it the perfect place for outdoor activities and playtime. The bedrooms are generously sized, providing plenty of space for everyone in the family.
Boasting a great location, just steps away from Gordon Pond, Lanyon Marketplace, schools, and playgrounds, this property is not to be missed.

rental.headline: Fantastic townhouse in the cultural heart of Canberra
rental.description:
Looking for a stylish and convenient townhouse in Dickson? Look no further than this stunning 2-bedroom, dual-level property!
As you step inside, you'll be greeted by a light-filled open-plan living area, complete with a modern kitchen and beautiful timber floors. The living area flows seamlessly onto a small low maintenance courtyard, perfect for relaxing with friends or enjoying a quiet cup of coffee.
Upstairs, you'll find two spacious bedrooms, each with soft carpets and plenty of natural light. There's also a study nook, making it the ideal spot to work from home or study.
Located just a short stroll from the bustling Dickson shops, this property is perfect for those who love to be in the heart of the action. You'll have a fantastic range of restaurants, cafes, and boutiques right on your doorstep, as well as easy access to government offices and transport hubs.
So why wait? Come and see this fantastic townhouse for yourself and start enjoying the best of Dickson living today!

rental.headline: Cozy Cottage in Narrabundah
rental.description:
Looking for a cozy cottage-style home in the leafy suburb of Narrabundah? This charming three-bedroom home is ready for you to move in and make it home.
Located in a leafy and family-friendly neighborhood, this property is surrounded by an array of lush parks, quality schools, and fantastic amenities. With its close proximity to the City and Parliamentary Triangle, you'll enjoy a short and easy commute to work or play.
Inside, the home boasts an updated kitchen that's perfect for preparing your favorite meals and hosting dinner parties. The spacious living area is perfect for entertaining guests, and the abundance of natural light and fresh air create a warm and inviting ambiance throughout the home.
Outside, the plant-filled backyard provides a tranquil oasis where you can escape the hustle and bustle of city life and unwind in the great outdoors. Whether you're a keen gardener or just looking for a peaceful place to relax, this backyard is sure to impress.

rental.description:
This spacious four bedroom property is bursting with character and charm, and is sure to impress.

rental.headline: Discover a new way of life at Lumeah
rental.description:
Discover luxury living at Lumeah, an exclusive collection of 10 premium townhouses located on a serene, tree-lined street in the highly sought-after Narrabundah neighbourhood. Each of these beautifully designed residences boasts high-quality finishes and fixtures that will leave you feeling pampered and indulged.
Inside, the living area is a true masterpiece, featuring soaring 3.6m high ceilings and full-height glazed windows that optimise natural light and ventilation. The sliding doors seamlessly connect the living areas with the alfresco and courtyard, offering a seamless indoor-outdoor flow that is perfect for entertaining guests or simply relaxing in your private oasis.
Lumeah's design also includes ducted reverse cycle heating and cooling to keep you comfortable all year round.
But it's not just the luxurious interiors that make Lumeah special. This highly walkable neighbourhood offers easy access to Narrabundah Shops, Fyshwick Markets, St Benedict's Primary School, St Clare's High School, St Edmund's College, Narrabundah College, the ACT Golf Academy Driving range, Capital Golf Club and so much more.
Experience the ultimate in luxury living at Lumeah, where every detail has been thoughtfully considered to provide you with the perfect blend of style, comfort, and convenience.

rental.headline: Ready to be enjoyed
rental.description:
Work, life and play combine in one vibrant cultural precinct. DKSN signals the rebirth of Dickson, this meticulously-designed two bedroom apartment is a must see. Inspired by Melbourne’s eat-streets, DKSN will boast al fresco dining areas brimming with energy and life, and high-quality retail offerings will attract treasure-seekers.
Designed with modern living in mind, all the essential amenities will be at residents’ fingertips—from markets to medical, cafés to childcare, gyms to green spaces. But DKSN is not only about community—it’s about connection. Light rail and Dickson Interchange are at DKSN’s doorstep, linking it effortlessly to the city, northern suburbs and beyond.
Residents reap the benefits of established infrastructure—a library, large supermarket, clubs, schools, nature reserves, parks, public pool, bars and cafés.
DKSN’s close proximity to the city centre and hotspot of Braddon make it the ideal base for urban adventures—from high street shopping to a cornucopia of food experiences. The University of Canberra, Australian Institute of Sport and GIO Stadium are all within an easy drive; while, to the east, a wealth of nature reserves are begging to be explored.
During summer, Dickson Aquatic Centre offers a shady oasis with three heated pools and barbeque and picnic areas, while community gardens give residents the opportunity to grow organic produce for their home.
Features Include:
- 2 bedrooms with 2 bathrooms and 1 car space - Undercover Balcony - Mountain views from multiple areas - Large open plan meals and living area - Double glazed windows - Beautiful full sized kitchen with integrated Ariston fridge, Smeg electric cooking, stone bench-tops, smeg dishwasher and ample cupboard space - LED lighting throughout - Quality floor coverings throughout - Split system air-conditioning - Separate laundry with dryer and tub - 1 secure car park and storage - Walking distance to light rail stop - Moments walk to restaurants and nightlife of Dickson - Voice and Video intercom directly to the apartment - Provision to NBN access - 5 min drive to Canberra CBD - Close to Schools, shops, restaurants, bars, business hubs, golf course, ANU - Applicants to seek permission to keep pets - EER not available - Available 9th of February 2026

rental.headline: Fully furnished in Trilogy
rental.description:
Located in the highly sought after Trilogy complex, this exquisite one-bedroom apartment captures attention. Embracing an enviable location in Woden, it truly lies at the heart of all the action. Within close proximity, you'll discover a plethora of shops, restaurants, bars, as well as educational and community facilities. Notable amenities in the vicinity include The Canberra Hospital, Marist and Canberra College, Westfield Woden, and the expanding restaurant and bar precinct. Moreover, this apartment's strategic positioning stands to benefit immensely from the proposed Woden light rail extension, with the anticipated route running conveniently within walking distance from the development.
The apartment exudes a sense of spaciousness with its high ceilings, while the open plan layout is enhanced by expansive sliding doors and windows that invite abundant natural light to cascade in. Connecting seamlessly to the living area is the balcony, offering elevated views of Mt Mugga Mugga Reserve, Phillip Oval, and the lush, tree-lined suburbs of Garran and Hughes.
The fully equipped and versatile kitchen boasts stylish stone benchtops, top-quality stainless steel Bosch appliances, and a full-height pantry with additional overhead cupboards, providing ample storage capacity. The well-proportioned bedroom features mirrored sliding built-in robes and large floor-to-ceiling windows that mirror the stunning views from the balcony. The main bathroom is adorned with full-height tiling, a wall-hung vanity, and a semi-frameless, easy-to-clean shower screen.
Trilogy, as a development, holds an esteemed reputation and has been masterfully crafted by one of Canberra's finest development teams, offering resort-like amenities. Residents can enjoy a fully equipped gym, a pool and spa, as well as BBQ facilities, ensuring a lifestyle of utmost comfort and convenience.

rental.headline: Sensational Spacious Apartment in the Space Complex!
rental.description:
SPACE, The Residence.
Without a doubt Turner's most iconic apartment complex. Awarded the Royal Australian Institute of Architects Commendation in 2006 and crowned the winner of the Master Builders Association Awards in 2005, this apartment has been built with day to day living at the forefront of the mind.
A rare offering in this complex, this apartment has a large, spacious and innovative floor plan with an oversized balcony that wraps around the apartment and sensational views overlooking Black Mountain and Telstra Tower. The ceiling heights are generous and the creation of the sense of space and light is accentuated by the full height, doors and windows, ensuring year round comfort. Wide hallways, spacious living, natural cross ventilation and sensational ambient lighting - you're going to feel immediately at home the moment you step through the front door.
Features Include:
- 2 Spacious bedrooms with built-ins, master with ensuite - Oversized balcony that wraps around the apartment - Views overlooking Black Mountain and Telstra Tower - High ceilings with floor to ceiling double glazed doors and windows throughout - Miele appliances including integrated dishwasher and refrigerator and European tapware throughout - Unparalleled acoustic insulation - Soffit mounted reverse cycle climate control system ducted to all rooms - CAT6 Data cabling throughout, FOXTEL and FTTP ready - 2 large side by side car spaces and 1x 3m2 dedicated secure storage cage - Applicants to seek permission to keep pets - EER 5.5 - Available now
There is no compromise on location! Adjacent Canberra's light rail, super close to Canberra's culinary hotspots (Braddon) and a walkable distance to Civic. Simply put: You're going to wish you had moved in sooner!
- 50m to Northbourne Ave's major bus lines; with 10 routes to choose from, I think it's pretty safe to say you're connected to the whole city - 500m to Turner School - 750m to Lonsdale Street and Haig Park. Your selection of top-notch eateries has never been better! - A cruisey 1.5km walk will land you at the Canberra Centre

rental.headline: This Is Not Your Standard Apartment
rental.description:
The moment you set foot in this delightful two-storey ground-floor one-bedroom + study apartment within Barton's sought-after Realm Park complex, you are struck by its distinctive charm and character.
The apartment's thoughtful architecture, generous dimensions and high-quality fittings and finishes have been beautifully enhanced with additional design features and finishes, to provide it with a warm, inviting and somewhat eclectic ambience.
On its ground level, this immaculate apartment has a spacious open-plan living and dining area, a premium kitchen and a powder room. The spotless kitchen is equipped with stainless steel Miele appliances, quality stone bench tops and soft close cabinets and has ample storage. Floor-to-ceiling full-width glazing results in an abundance of natural light and includes sliding doors providing access to an east-facing courtyard.
A beautiful open timber stair case provides access to the apartment's upper level, where there is a roomy east-facing bedroom with good-sized built-in wardrobe and floor-to ceiling full-width glazing, a generous study area, a sleek, well-appointed, marble-accented bathroom and a large, separate laundry with tub and clothes dryer.
Down in the building's secure basement, the apartment has a well-located single parking space with adjacent enclosed storage. There is also bicycle parking in the basement.
The location of this outstanding apartment - the Realm Precinct - is also second to none. The precinct is a stylish mixed-use area with a little bit of everything. On the apartment's doorstep are an array of professional, medical and specialty retail services, as well as five-star hotels, gyms and health spas, funky cafes and bars, and some of Canberra's best restaurants. But the modest scale of the Precinct means it is still a pleasant place in which to live.
Of course, its location in the heart of Barton, recognised as Canberra's most 'liveable' suburb, means the Realm Precinct is in close proximity to the best Canberra has to offer. Perched on the edge of the Parliamentary Triangle and a stone's throw from Lake Burley Griffin, it is just minutes to the CBD, Braddon, Russell, lively Kingston Foreshore, eclectic Old Kingston and charming Manuka Village.
The Realm Precinct also has good access to transport, being adjacent to the Gold Line and two blocks away from the Red Rapid and Green Rapid services - so no more arduous commuting and paid parking!
This stand-out apartment is vacant, so its many charms and conveniences are ready to be enjoyed. Don't delay in viewing it.
Key features: - Quiet, easterly aspect - Generous open-plan living and dining area opening to courtyard - Premium kitchen with quality European appliances - Spacious east-facing upper-level bedroom with generous wardrobe - Separate study - Well-appointed, marble-accented bathroom - Separate laundry - Downstairs powder room - Ample internal storage - Ducted heating and cooling - 6-star energy efficiency rating - Secure basement parking spaces with adjacent storage

The abundance of natural light flows seamlessly throughout the wide-open spaces of the open-plan living and dining areas. This beautiful private property has been designed with amazing high end fixtures and finishes. The apartment boasts stunning interiors with every room showcasing an exquisite tapestry of bespoke executive finishes. Surpassing even the highest of expectations, this state of the art contemporary home is a celebration of modern architecture and design. Newly built residence with an unsurpassed level of quality finishes that epitomises contemporary design for a luxury and low-maintenance lifestyle. An exercise in functionality, this residence presents a chic neutral decorating palette.

The modern kitchen has stainless steel appliances, a dishwasher, and Caesar stone bench tops. The bedrooms are cozy, and the natural light that flows through makes a comfortable and relaxing personal space.

rental.headline: Fantastic 1 Bedroom - Ready to Enjoy
rental.description:
Discover the ultimate urban living experience at 163/217 Northbourne Avenue! This stunning 1 bedroom apartment is located in the prestigious "On Forbes" development, and features a secure carpark, providing you with peace of mind and added convenience. The apartment is situated in the highly sought-after suburb of Turner, just a stone's throw away from the tram and the city, making your daily commute a breeze.
Step inside and be greeted by a stylish and modern interior, complete with all the necessary amenities to make you feel right at home. The apartment comes equipped with reverse cycle air conditioning, dishwasher and washer/dryer, making household chores a snack.
Take advantage of the incredible on-site gymnasium, perfect for keeping fit and active, all while enjoying the stunning views. The location of this property is second to none, with an array of shops, cafes and restaurants right at your doorstep.

rental.headline: Experience 3 Bedroom Luxurious Living!
rental.description:
Welcome to your dream home! This exquisite 3-bedroom townhouse is a rare find in the highly sought-after suburb of Watson. Prepare to be captivated by its sophisticated design, seamless indoor-outdoor flow, and an array of enticing features that will elevate your living experience to new heights.
Step into the bright and airy living space that exudes elegance and comfort. The carefully planned layout allows for effortless transitions between different areas of the home, making it perfect for both relaxation and entertaining. With the abundance of natural light, you'll be enveloped in a warm and inviting atmosphere.
The second level of this stunning townhouse houses three generously proportioned bedrooms, each equipped with built-in robes for ample storage. The master suite is a true retreat, boasting a walk-through wardrobe and a lavish ensuite bathroom, ensuring your own private sanctuary within the home.
Embrace the outdoors in your low-maintenance paved courtyard, where you can host delightful gatherings with friends and family. From here, enjoy picturesque views of the expansive central park, complete with a BBQ area and a playful playground, adding a touch of green tranquility to your surroundings.
The stylish kitchen is a chef's delight, equipped with top-of-the-line Smeg appliances, including a dishwasher, and plenty of bench space for your culinary creations. It's a space where both form and function meet, making meal preparation an enjoyable experience.
This townhouse comes equipped with modern conveniences that enhance your living experience, such as solar panels, ducted reverse-cycle air conditioning with zone control, and double glazed windows, ensuring a comfortable and energy-efficient home throughout the year. The European-style laundry, complete with a dryer, adds to the convenience and functionality of the space.
More highlights include a spacious main bathroom with a luxurious bathtub, additional storage space thoughtfully tucked away below the staircase, and access to lightning-fast NBN internet. Your convenience is further amplified by a double garage with internal access, ensuring your vehicles are secure and easily accessible.
Immerse yourself in the vibrant lifestyle of Watson, surrounded by a plethora of entertainment and dining options. The heart of Canberra is just a short drive away, putting everything you need within reach.
Don't let this opportunity slip through your fingers. Embrace the luxury, comfort, and convenience of this exceptional townhouse - your perfect new home awaits!
- 2-storey, open plan design - Generously sized bedrooms, all with built-in robes - Main bedroom boasting an ensuite and walk-through wardrobe - Solar Panels - Stylish kitchen with ample bench space & Smeg appliances including dishwasher - Ducted reverse-cycle air conditioning which is zoned to up and downstairs - Double glazed windows - European style laundry including dryer - Large main bathroom with bath tub. - Privacy and block out curtains in the main bedroom and one of the rear bedrooms - Privacy blinds to the downstairs windows - Additional storage space below staircase - NBN-enabled - Double garage with internal access - Continuous electric hot water - EV charger in the garage - Access to communal zones within the development - Applicants to seek permission to keep pets - EER 6.0

rental.headline: Premium Urban Fringe Townhouse with Outdoor Oasis
rental.description:
Discover the epitome of sophisticated living in this magnificent three-story townhouse, a masterful creation by acclaimed architects. Nestled on the urban fringe yet mere minutes from the CBD, this residence redefines upscale living, offering an escape from the ordinary confines of inner-city apartment living.
Immerse yourself in a welcoming community ambiance, where residents cultivate a shared vegetable patch, congregate in lush communal gardens, and watch their children frolic in the on-site cubby house.
Privacy abounds as well, with direct exclusive access from your secure covered parking directly to your abode. Enjoy your own tranquil courtyard garden, a private balcony, and a charming atrium, each providing their own sanctuaries.
The ground floor seamlessly blends open-plan living and dining, extending effortlessly to outdoor spaces. The kitchen boasts an elongated island bench, catering to culinary endeavors and hosting with ease.
Ascending to the upper level, the master suite beckons as a serene retreat. Dual-aspect views and a spacious balcony offer a connection to the surrounding treetops, while a walk-through wardrobe leads to a luxurious ensuite adorned with floor-to-ceiling Italian tiles.
Two additional generously proportioned bedrooms grace the second floor, complemented by a family bathroom for added convenience. An adjacent European laundry streamlines daily chores.
The location's convenience is unrivaled, with a nearby bike path, the charming Café Clay, and the iconic Tilley's at Lyneham just a stone's throw away. The vibrant hub of Braddon awaits with a leisurely stroll, or effortlessly reach the city via the nearby light rail.

rental.headline: Fully Furnished Gem in Reid
rental.description:
This fully furnished rental property is a charming and spacious two-story 1930's heritage duplex nestled on a picturesque oak-lined street. Located in a prime area close to the CBD and the lake, this home is a perfect blend of classic character and modern convenience.
The original part of the house showcases all the distinctive features of 1930's architecture, including 10-foot battened ceilings, timber sash windows, elegant picture rails, Cypress pine floors, solid timber doors, and a magnificent Art-Deco fireplace, which has been thoughtfully converted to mains gas. A seamless extension was added in the 1970s, enhancing the utility of the home. Now, it offers 4 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and 2 spacious living areas.
Two standout features of this property are the formal lounge with its charming fireplace and the generous dining/meals/family area, which provides an inviting space for family and friends. The kitchen received a beautiful renovation, boasting a modern French Provincial style. It is equipped with top-of-the-line appliances. The kitchen also features quality Italian porcelain tiles and German soft-touch drawer mechanisms.
The home's curb appeal is undeniable, and it faces north to the rear. The expansive and picturesque gardens include a superb vegetable garden, and there is a carport to complete the picture.
From many of the upstairs windows, you'll enjoy a view of the magnificent Mt Ainslie. The leafy and private backyard, combined with the tranquility of the location, make it hard to believe that you're on the outskirts of Australia's capital city.
Key Features: - Extended 1930's 2-story full brick duplex with character - Fully furnished - 4 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and 2 living areas - Beautifully renovated kitchen - High battened ceilings, picture rails, and timber sash windows - Stunning Art Deco fireplace (now converted to gas) - Lovely, private rear garden with an impressive vegetable patch - 668 m2 block with a north-facing rear aspect - Walking distance to Glebe Park, the city, and the lake - Energy Efficiency Rating (EER): 0.5 - Available NOW
Don't miss the opportunity to make this charming and historic duplex your new home. Contact us today for a viewing!

The living area is equipped with reverse cycle air conditioning and opens up to a generous courtyard that maximises the corner block's space. The property also includes an allocated car space, with room for an additional car, and a storage cage.

rental.headline: Exceptional 2-Bedroom Apartment in Prime Location
rental.description:
Situated in the sought-after 'Eminence' complex, this remarkable two-bedroom apartment presents an excellent rental opportunity. Boasting a central location with easy access to all local amenities.
Upon entering, you'll be welcomed by the spacious open-plan living/dining area, perfect for relaxation and entertainment. The living space seamlessly extends to a covered outdoor balcony, providing an ideal setting for BBQs and outdoor living. The well-positioned kitchen features modern amenities, including an electric cooktop, range hood, dual sink, dishwasher, electric oven, microwave space, ample storage, and a 20mm granite bench-top. Concealed behind doors is the laundry, with convenient access to the two-way main bathroom.
The sizeable main bedroom, adjacent to the living/kitchen area, offers built-in cupboards, abundant natural light, and a well-appointed ensuite. This bedroom also opens onto the balcony through a sliding door. The second bedroom is equipped with built-in robes and direct access to the main bathroom.
The two-way main bathroom features a vanity, ample bench space, a separate shower, and a toilet. Throughout the unit, you'll find beautiful new carpets and neutral freshly re-painted tones, creating a turnkey living space. A designated underground secure car space with a storage cage is easily accessible via a lift.
The 'Eminence' development, housing only 35 residential apartments across four levels, is conveniently located just a short stroll from popular restaurants, cafes, bars, and boutique shops. Additionally, it is minutes away from the Old Bus Depot Markets, Lake Burley Griffin, Kingston Foreshore, Fyshwick, Parliamentary Triangle, and the City Centre.

rental.headline: Tranquility across a seamless single-level layout
rental.description:
Escape to this welcoming abode, a double brick sanctuary exuding comfort and tranquility across a seamless single-level layout. Nestled in a coveted locale, this contemporary dwelling promises both immediate gratification and boundless future potential. Tailored for family living and entertaining, this four-bedroom haven delivers ample space and adaptability. Here's what sets this property apart:
- Warmth and Character: Feature brick walls impart a sense of charm, complemented by lofty 2.7m ceilings fostering an airy ambiance.
- Entertainment Haven: The expansive lounge boasts an open fireplace, brick accents, and timber sliding doors leading to the lush gardens, offering an inviting space for relaxation or gatherings.
- Well-Appointed Kitchen: Enjoy the convenience of a gourmet kitchen adorned with jarrah bench-tops, Tasmanian blackwood cabinetry, and abundant storage, seamlessly integrating with the family room flooded with northern sunlight.
- Flexible Living Spaces: With four bedrooms including a generous master with a spa-like ensuite, plus the option to convert the fourth bedroom into a study, this residence caters to diverse lifestyles.
- Impeccable Condition: Meticulously maintained, this home offers modern comforts while preserving high-quality craftsmanship rarely found in today's construction.
- Expansive Outdoor Oasis: Situated on a sprawling 951sqm block, the property features easy-care gardens, a private courtyard, and a tranquil rear garden, providing a serene retreat.
- Convenience and Accessibility: Benefit from an oversized double garage with internal access, and wheelchair-accessible features, all within moments of major shopping centres and schools.
- Energy Efficiency: Embrace sustainable living with 9.8kW solar panels and 3-phase power, enhancing both environmental consciousness and cost savings.
- Ducted / in roof heating and cooling installed in 2020. - All bedrooms have external access. - Heaps of external parking.
This unique residence presents a rare opportunity to experience refined living amidst a serene setting, embodying timeless elegance and modern convenience.

rental.headline: Prime Inner City Living: Two-Bedroom Apartment with Parkside Views
rental.description:
Nestled atop the esteemed 'Parkside' development in Turner, this two-bedroom ensuite apartment presents an enticing opportunity. Boasting a prime location just moments from the vibrant hubs of the City and Braddon, this residence offers:
- Prime Inner City Location: Positioned in the heart of Turner, enjoy unparalleled access to urban amenities and entertainment options.
- Tranquil 'Parkside' Complex: Embrace the serene ambiance of the 'Parkside' community, complete with a charming courtyard and meticulously landscaped gardens.
- Elevated Top Floor Position: Enjoy sweeping views and abundant natural light from the top floor of the complex, enhancing the sense of space and tranquility.
- North-Facing Aspect: Bask in sunlight throughout the day with a desirable north-facing orientation, amplifying the bright and airy atmosphere.
- Contemporary Interior: Contemporary flooring, blinds, and paint, the open-plan living areas exude modern elegance, seamlessly flowing onto a generously sized tiled balcony overlooking the picturesque park.
- Well-Equipped Kitchen: The kitchen features stone bench-tops, electric stove, dishwasher, breakfast bar, and ample storage, ideal for culinary enthusiasts.
- Comfortable Bedrooms: Retreat to the master bedroom with a walk-in wardrobe and ensuite, while the second bedroom offers a built-in wardrobe, ensuring both style and functionality.
- Modern Amenities: Benefit from a spacious main bathroom with a large shower, a separate European-style laundry, and a reverse-cycle split system for year-round comfort.
- Convenient Parking and Storage: Enjoy the convenience of two basement car spaces, along with a storage cage for added practicality.
- Vibrant Urban Lifestyle: Take advantage of easy walking distance to the City and Braddon, with an array of restaurants, cafes, shops, and amenities at your fingertips, plus close proximity to ANU.
Don't miss this opportunity to rent this stylish and conveniently located residence in the heart of Turner.

rental.description:

The apartment features a contemporary kitchen with electric cooking, a dishwasher, and a versatile island bench, seamlessly leading to an open-plan living area. Enjoy comfort all year round with a split system that complements the space, while glass sliding doors open to a private balcony—ideal for unwinding or entertaining.
The master bedroom offers a luxurious retreat, complete with a spacious walk-through robe that connects to a chic, modern bathroom. Additional conveniences include a European-style laundry with a dryer and an allocated car space for your ease.
Residents of the Metropolitan complex have access to premium amenities, including a 25-metre indoor heated pool, a fully equipped gymnasium, a relaxing sauna, and beautifully landscaped green spaces. Two BBQ facilities provide the perfect setting for outdoor gatherings, making this home a perfect blend of comfort and luxury.

rental.headline: Impeccable Designer Home – Ideal for Embassies, Defence Personnel, and Families
rental.description:
This architecturally designed, high-spec residence offers an extraordinary lifestyle in a highly sought-after location, perfect for Embassies, Defence personnel, families, or extended families. Finished to an impeccable standard, this four-bedroom home is ready to welcome new occupants, featuring a thoughtfully designed floor plan tailored for modern living and versatile needs.
Centered around a breathtaking courtyard, the home is flooded with natural light and offers excellent space separation. The layout is ideal for multi-generational families, remote professionals, or anyone desiring additional privacy, with independent wings that include separate entrances, living areas, and even a second kitchen.
The heart of the home features an open-plan living area with soaring ceilings, a gas fireplace set against a stunning stone wall, and a gourmet kitchen that opens seamlessly to the courtyard and easy-care gardens—perfect for hosting family and friends.
Located near Mount Stromlo, 400 meters away from Evelyn Scott High School. Walking distance to Ridgeline Playground, Molonglo River, and Denman Village Shops. A short drive to the City Centre, Woden CBD and Belconnen CBD. This home delivers exceptional lifestyle convenience.

This exceptional home is a must-see for those seeking luxury, versatility, and comfort in a prime location.

rental.headline: Light Filled Home for Rent in Franklin
rental.description:
This lovely, light-filled home in Franklin is now available for rent. At the front of the house, you'll find a versatile bedroom that can also be used as a study or guest room. The cosy lounge room is bathed in sunlight, making it a warm and inviting space during the winter months.
The kitchen offers an open living space and leads to a deck, perfect for entertaining. It features a gas cooktop, dishwasher, stone bench-tops, and a breakfast bar with plenty of storage. There are two bathrooms, including an ensuite in the master bedroom. The third bedroom, located at the back of the house, enjoys beautiful morning sunlight.
The spacious laundry has a convenient back door leading to the backyard and clothesline. The home is fitted with a evaporative cooling system for comfort during the hot summer months, along with ducted gas heating to efficiently warm the entire home during winter. With a 4-star energy rating, this home is both comfortable and energy-efficient.
Ideally located in Franklin, this home offers easy access to the city and Gungahlin for all your shopping needs. A bus stop is conveniently located just down the road, and light rail close by providing transport to both the City and Gungahlin.
The garage provides ample space for a car or secure storage. Don’t miss out on this fantastic rental opportunity!

rental.headline: Charming Family Home in Harrison
rental.description:
Welcome to your new sanctuary! This beautifully designed 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom home in the heart of Harrison combines modern comforts with an inviting atmosphere, perfect for families or professionals seeking a peaceful lifestyle. And to add, the property has brand new carpets and has been fully painted throughout.
Spacious Living Areas: Step inside to a bright and airy open-plan living and dining area, bathed in natural light. This versatile space is perfect for entertaining guests or enjoying quiet evenings with family. The seamless flow into the kitchen enhances the overall functionality of the home. There is also a separate living area at the front of the property.
Modern Kitchen: The well-appointed kitchen is a chef's dream, featuring sleek stainless steel appliances, including a gas cooktop and oven. Ample cabinetry and a large island with a breakfast bar provide plenty of space for meal preparation and casual dining.
Comfortable Bedrooms: Retreat to one of the three generously sized bedrooms, each equipped with built-in wardrobes for maximum storage. The master bedroom boasts an ensuite bathroom, providing a private oasis for relaxation.
Stylish Bathrooms: Enjoy the convenience of two well-designed bathrooms, featuring contemporary fixtures, plenty of counter space, and stylish tiles. The main bathroom includes a bathtub, perfect for unwinding after a long day.
Double Garage: The property features a secure double garage with internal access, offering both convenience and additional storage space. Driveway parking is also available for guests.
Outdoor Living: The low-maintenance backyard is ideal for families, with enough space for kids to play or for you to create your own garden oasis. Enjoy weekend barbecues or simply relax in the fresh air on the covered patio.
Location: Nestled in a family-friendly neighbourhood, 10 Wannon Lane is just moments away from local parks, playgrounds, and walking trails, making it perfect for outdoor enthusiasts. The property is also conveniently located near schools, shopping centres, and public transport options, offering easy access to all that Harrison has to offer.
This stunning property is ready to welcome you home! Don’t miss out on this opportunity—contact us today to schedule a viewing or for more information. Experience the charm and convenience of living at 10 Wannon Lane, Harrison!
