rental.headline: Luxury Family Home for Rent in Sought-After Forde
rental.description:
Discover the perfect blend of style, comfort, and functionality at 98 Zakharov Avenue, Forde. This architecturally designed residence offers a unique opportunity to lease a high-end home with exceptional finishes and space to match your lifestyle.
Built by a master stone mason, this home stands out with bespoke stone features, soaring ceilings, and thoughtfully designed living spaces that invite natural light and effortless indoor-outdoor flow.
From the moment you enter, you’re welcomed by a grand open-plan living area with striking 5-metre raked ceilings—creating a sense of space and elegance. The home is designed for energy efficiency, keeping you cool in the summer and warm in the winter, all while lowering your energy bills.
Key Features: - Four spacious bedrooms with full-length windows - Multiple living areas including a separate theatre or rumpus room - Custom study with built-in stone-topped desk - Ducted heating & cooling plus additional split system units - Chef’s kitchen with Miele appliances, oversized stone bench-tops, and walk-in butler’s pantry - Outdoor entertaining area with full outdoor kitchen and six-stacked glass doors - Two stunning bathrooms with marble tiles, dual vanities, and freestanding bath - Additional powder room for guests - Solid ironbark timber floors throughout - Fully landscaped gardens with irrigation system, rainwater tank, and garden shed - Large double garage with internal access - North-facing aspect for year-round natural light
This home offers a total of 368sqm under roofline including 270sqm of internal living space and a 50sqm alfresco—ideal for entertaining or relaxing in your private garden sanctuary.
Prime Location: - 400m to Zakharov Pond - 600m to Burgmann Anglican School - 700m to Forde shops - 7 mins to Gungahlin Town Centre - 23 mins to Canberra CBD
This is more than just a rental—it's a lifestyle upgrade in one of Gungahlin’s most popular neighbourhoods.

residential.headline: Fantastic Opportunity That Should Not Be Missed
residential.description:
Experience Canberra’s most exquisite new residential lifestyle, at Grand Central Towers.
A place where the past and future collide, inspired by the restless energy and timeless sophistication of New York’s Grand Central Station. Imagine a towering urban masterpiece reaching high above the revitalised Woden Town Centre. Where refinement and quality always reign. Where every accoutrement, every luxury and every inspiration lies within effortless reach. Where life is lived on the grandest of scales, day and night.
Located in the geographic centre of Canberra, Grand Central Towers puts you close to everything, and everywhere. Seamless transport connections make each journey an easy one, with extensive cycle, bus and road networks just moments from your door. The proposed Stage 2 of the $900 million Light Rail Network will also link residents directly to Capital Hill, the Canberra CBD and beyond.
Brilliantly located and appointed, Grand Central Towers delivers a breathtaking balance of luxury and amenity. Architecturally designed to blend nature, light and open spaces with an abundance of quality finishings throughout, revel in the highest calibre of contemporary styling and exclusive resident facilities. Life at Grand Central Towers gives you access to a stunning collection of exclusive amenities and resident-only spaces. Whatever your mood, whatever the occasion, you’ll always find the perfect setting to work, relax, mingle or even host private gatherings and functions.
Features:
* North Facing Apartment * Level 10 Apartment * Entitlement to Free Good Quality Blinds * Tranquil rooftop retreat with reflection pond * Dining room * Pristine pool and deck area with breathtaking views and change room facilities * Private outdoor kitchen surrounded by landscaped gardens * Resident lounge * Private function spaces * Bicycle workshop * Gym and cardio room * Private resident concierge * Exclusive resident car wash * Climate-controlled wine cellar * Striking floor-to-ceiling double glazing Lounge and Library * Secure resident parking

residential.headline: Neat As A Pin In An Ultra-Convenient Location
residential.description:
This stylish and contemporary 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom home is perfect for those seeking a carefree lock-up and leave lifestyle. Immaculately maintained and beautifully presented, this wonderfully spacious residence is perfectly appointed for relaxed living and year round entertaining. Crafted to the highest specification with magnificent natural light filled interiors, this home offers extraordinary quality, providing a haven of exquisite comfort and class. An exercise in functionality, this apartment presents a chic neutral decorating palette.
Impressive throughout, the home is situated in a highly desirable quiet street with the convenience of local schools, shops and sports facilities just a short drive away. Enjoying a sunlit northerly aspect, the bright open plan interiors seamlessly connect to a full-length balcony, perfect for throwing the doors open on a balmy night. The modern kitchen has stainless steel appliances, a dishwasher, and Caesar stone bench tops. This apartment boasts split system air-conditioning, intercom system and secure parking. The complex has facilities of a pool and large entertaining area.
• Short walk to parks, primary school and public transport • Reverse cycle, split system air-conditioning for climate control • Carpeted living area for warmth and comfort • Customised built-in cabinetry and storage in the kitchen • Main bedroom and living area has access to a private terrace/balcony • Private outdoor entertaining area • Bright and cozy living area
Don't miss this opportunity to secure your slice of ultimate city living with all the trimmings. Every once in a while an apartment is offered to the market that ticks all the boxes!

residential.headline: Neat As A Pin In An Ultra-Convenient Location
residential.description:
Every once in a while an apartment is offered to the market that ticks all the boxes!
Centrally located and just a stroll to all the amenities the area has to offer, this delightful two-bedroom unit in the popular 'HUDSON SQUARE' complex is sure to please.
As you enter the unit you are greeted with an open plan area with plenty of space on offer. The kitchen is well positioned and its functional design includes electric cooktop, range hood, sink, dishwasher, electric oven, storage with plenty of bench space on the 20mm granite bench-top. The living/dining area flows from the kitchen and is a good size. There is a covered outdoor balcony off this area that is ideal for a bbq and outdoor living.
The large main bedroom suitably comes off the living area. It has built in cupboards, plenty of natural light, and a well-proportioned ensuite. The other bedroom is equipped with built in robes and can accommodate large bedroom furniture. Both these bedrooms also have access onto a separate balcony via sliding doors.
The main bathroom is accommodated with a vanity and plenty of bench space, separate shower and toilet. The laundry is neatly tucked away behind concealed doors.
The unit has beautiful carpets and neutral paint tones throughout. The one allocated underground secure car space with storage cage is conveniently located under the complex accessed via a lift.
Other features the property includes is direct access to the light rail, bus stop, café’s, restaurants, medical centre, retail outlets and grocery shopping. It is also very close to licensed clubs, department stores, banks, schools, arterial roads and the list is endless.
Key Statistics: Internal - 75 sq/m Balconies - 27 sq/m Rates - $373 per quarter Land Tax (For Investors) - $434 per quarter Strata - $1,170 per quarter
Certificate of Compliance (18 Feb 2016)
Admin Fund - $160,405 (as at 23/3/22) Sinking Fund - $255,126 (as at 23/3/22)
Features: - Main bedroom with Built in Robes, Ensuite and Balcony access - Large Bedroom with Built in Robes and Balcony access - Bathroom with vanity, shower, toilet - Concealed laundry - Fantastic kitchen with stainless steel appliances and granite bench-tops - Split System Air-conditioning - 2nd Covered balcony of living area - 1 Allocated car space under building with storage cage - Security intercom - Close to schools and transport - Walking distance to endless Amenities

Don't Delay. This property is RARE!
residential.description:
This well presented two bedroom apartment is situated only a minutes stroll from the Kingston shopping and dining precinct, the Kingston foreshore, not to mention it’s close proximity to the Kingston Bus Depot Markets, Manuka, Lake Burley Griffin and the Parliamentary Triangle.
Currently tenanted @ $490 per week until 14 March 2023.
Positioned on the first floor of the popular “Howitt Place” development, it features:
- Spacious open plan living with access to the balcony - Reverse cycle air conditioning - Kitchen with dishwasher and electric cooking - Master bedroom with built in wardrobe & access to it’s own balcony - 2nd bedroom with built in wardrobe - Bathroom with shower, vanity & toilet - European styled laundry with clothes dryer - Quality carpets - Neutral decor - Single underground car park with lockable storeroom - Front door visitor parking - Swimming pool in complex - Landscaped gardens

residential.headline: Centrally Located to the Canberra Hospital and CIT
residential.description:
Centrally located across the road from the Canberra Hospital and just a stroll to Woden Town Centre, Phillip business/retail district, Philip Enclosed Oval, Woden Cemetery and Eddison Park, this delightful one-bedroom unit in the popular 'Central Park' complex is sure to please.
The large bedroom conveniently located at the front of the property has built in robes, plenty of natural light with lovely garden views. The bathroom located across from the Bedroom is accommodated with a spa bathtub, vanity, shower and toilet. Within the Bathroom, located separately is the laundry equipped with Washing Machine, Dryer and Tub with storage under.
The home has a large open plan living/dining area with plenty of space on offer. There is a covered outdoor entertaining space off this area that overlooks gardens. The kitchen is in good condition and its functional design includes an electric cooktop, range hood, fridge, microwave, under bench electric oven with plenty of bench space.
The allocated covered carport (with storage space) is conveniently located near the block entrance. The complex is finished with beautiful gardens and play area for children and sporting enthusiasts.
The property has been updated with new flooring, blinds, kitchen appliances and fully repainted.
Features: * One bedroom with built-ins * Ground floor unit * Covered spacious outdoor entertaining area * Allocated car space * External store room * Close to Canberra Hospital and transport * Centrally located to Hindmarsh Drive and Yamba Drive * Walking distance to Woden Town Centre and Phillip business/retail district, Phillip enclosed oval, Woden Cemetery and Eddison Park.

residential.headline: 3 Bedroom, 3 Bathrooms in Luxury Apartment
Neat As A Pin In An Ultra-Convenient Location
Be Quick - This apartment is a GEM
Low Set Family Home In Quiet Cul-De-Sac
Rare Opportunity - Fully Renovated with Style and Sophistication
Position And Potential - RZ2 Block
residential.description:
This home exudes casual elegance and invites relaxation and enjoyment. The timber floors add warmth while the large windows bathe this spacious split level home in natural light. Neutral colour schemes encourage light and no carpets throughout make cleaning a breeze. With the potential to renovate and add value, this house represents a great opportunity for investors, first homebuyers and small families.
Impressive throughout, the home is situated in a highly desirable quiet street with the convenience of local schools, shops and sports facilities just a short drive away. Plenty of bench space, storage and timber features make the kitchen the heart of the home. But it's when you're relaxing in your living room with timber floors and neutral tones that life is at its best and you feel right at home. residential.headline: Expansive, Exclusive & Private
residential.description:
Mowbray offers a harmonious blend of modern living, abundant natural light, and a breathtaking rural backdrop.
Nestled at the end of a private road within the exclusive and secluded Vallencia Country Estate, Mowbray radiates elegance and warmth. The meticulously maintained gardens enveloping the 340m2 five-bedroom residence create a picturesque setting, while its thoughtful design incorporates numerous family-friendly features.
Step inside Mowbray, and you'll be greeted by contemporary polished concrete floors that seamlessly flow throughout. The expansive central living area boasts floor-to-ceiling windows, bathing the space in natural light and accentuating the stunning views. The kitchen is exquisitely appointed with stone benchtops, stainless-steel appliances, and high ceilings that add to the overall grandeur.
The versatile design of the central living area allows you to personalise the space according to your needs. Whether you envision it as a lounge area, a second sitting/reading space, or a formal dining room, the choice is entirely yours.
Indulge in the complete luxury of the fully segregated master bedroom suite spanning an impressive 68m2. Divided into sections, the suite comprises a spacious bedroom with access to the front verandah offering breathtaking views of the Brindabella ranges, a lavish ensuite, a generous walk-in robe/dressing room, and a serene parents' retreat.
The remaining four bedrooms are equally spacious and feature built-in robes, delightful garden outlooks, and share a separate wing of the house that includes a family bathroom, a guest toilet, and a walk-in linen closet.
Situated on a fully fenced one-acre block, Mowbray boasts beautifully landscaped gardens that are easy to maintain. Furthermore, its convenient location ensures a stress-free 20-minute commute to Canberra's northern region.
This property has been tastefully modernised with freshly painted interior and fully landscaped gardens.
There is also an option of a fully functional hobby farm complete with ducks, chickens, roosters and even turkeys!
Residence Specifications: - 270m2 of residential living area, - 49.5m2 of covered verandah area, - 20m2 of covered alfresco area, - 77m2 of shed area encompassing a 7.2m2 cellar room/21m2 workshop/55.8m2 double garage area, Total area under roof: 416.5m2/44.78sq
Residential features: Living areas: - two-way formal entry foyer - spacious dual-aspect open plan central living space incorporating the stunning kitchen, living/games room, family & dining areas that lead out to the rear & very private alfresco - polished & heated concrete floors throughout - over-height ceilings
Kitchen - granite bench tops, soft close cabinetry & large island bench - 90cm stainless steel gas cooktop - 2 ovens including a double wall oven & a 90cm under-counter - top quality granite bench tops & soft-close cabinetry - large walk-in pantry - double-plumbed refrigerator cavity
Master bedroom suite - fully segregated with 68m2 in area (approx.) - spacious bedroom area with sliding door access to the rear gardens dual-aspect natural - 14m2 parents' retreat with sliding door access to the sheltered front verandah - stunning new 8m2 ensuite with frameless shower & 40cm rain head shower head - 8m2 walk-in robe with ample hanging & folding spaces
Secondary bedroom wing - including the family bathroom & walk-in linen closet - 4 large bedrooms located along a separate wing of the home all with built-in robes - excellent front-rear garden outlooks & heated polished concrete floors
Household general - front-of-home shelter verandahs with views to the Brindabellas - 2.7m high ceilings - large laundry/mud room - freshly painted home exteriors
• Climate control: hydronic in-slab multi-zoned heating across the home, 3 reverse-cycle air-conditioning units, Climate Comfort tinted windows
• Garaging: 2 secure car parks in forward garaging section of the 11m x 7m Colorbond shed which is attached to the home via a covered walkway. The shed is on a concrete pad & has a motorised 5.0m wide by 2.6m high clearance main access door - it also houses the 7.2m2 thermal walled & bottle racked wine cellar and the property workshop
• Hot water: electric off-peak -newly replaced system
• Gardens: well-established gardens with feature ornamental trees/shrubs, citrus & other fruit trees, large raised vegetable/herb garden & chook run with water supply
• Potable water supply: 110,000lt/24,196gall in-ground concrete rainwater tank harvesting from the combined house & shed roofline
• Non-potable water supply: Vallencia Country Estate community title water supply plumbed to external taps
• Sewerage: Enviro-cycle bio-septic system
• Block: 1acre/4,018m2 of fully fenced level land separated from neighbouring fence lines by estate common land walkways
• Council zoning & rates: Yass Valley Council, zones R5
• Vallencia Country Estate community title fees: $625.00 per quarter - covers community title non-potable water supply, access to the estate tennis court & maintenance of estate common areas/estate open pasture lands where you can graze one animal

residential.headline: Inner City Living At "Evolve"
residential.description:
Welcome to the Evolve complex, where contemporary elegance meets convenient city living. This stunning apartment offers a perfect blend of style and practicality, making it the ideal choice for those seeking a low-maintenance lifestyle.
Step inside and be captivated by the spacious open plan layout that effortlessly flows onto a generous balcony, providing an inviting space for entertaining friends and family. The abundance of natural light creates a bright and airy ambiance, enhancing the overall sense of warmth and comfort in this remarkable home.
The modern kitchen is a true highlight, boasting elegant finishes and top-of-the-line stainless steel appliances. With ample storage space available, you'll have no trouble keeping your culinary essentials organized and within easy reach. Additionally, the apartment is equipped with a split system air-conditioning, intercom, and secure parking for your convenience and peace of mind.
Perfectly situated in the sought-after Inner South, this residence offers unparalleled proximity to the Parliamentary Triangle, shopping precincts, and a wide range of dining options. Leave your car at home and explore all that this vibrant neighbourhood has to offer.
Inside the apartment, you'll find generously sized bedrooms that provide a tranquil retreat. The neutral and stylish tones throughout the property create a timeless backdrop that effortlessly complements any decor. Enjoy a leafy outlook that adds a touch of serenity to your daily life.
For those with busy schedules, the convenience of this location is unbeatable. The Parliamentary Circle is just a 5-minute drive away, while the renowned Canberra Centre is a mere 10-minute drive. If you prefer to take a leisurely stroll, the picturesque Kingston Foreshore is within a 20-minute walk or a quick 4-minute drive.

residential.headline: Luxurious Apartment Living in the Heart of Manhattan on the Park
residential.description:
Nestled on the ninth floor of the esteemed Manhattan on the Park, this refined apartment offers a haven you can proudly call home. As you step inside, you'll be greeted by a spacious open-plan living and dining area, bathed in natural light streaming through magnificent double-glazed floor-to-ceiling windows. This space exudes an aura of tranquility and relaxation. The apartment is an epitome of luxury, boasting sleek cabinetry, ample storage options, and pristine stone bench-tops.
The bedroom design reflects a thoughtful approach to space and functionality, with generous wardrobe space and an abundance of natural light, making the most of every square metre. Modern, opulent bathrooms with high-quality finishes are at the service of both bedrooms.

Opportunities like this don’t last long. Perfectly positioned in a leafy street just moments from the light rail, Canberra CBD, and the Australian National University, this functional three-bedroom home combines space, comfort, and convenience in one of the city’s most sought-after locations.
Whether you’re looking for a low-maintenance lifestyle close to schools, cafés, restaurants, parks, and shopping, or an excellent investment in the thriving Inner North, this property is sure to impress.
Features: * 3 bedrooms, all with built-in robes and ceiling fans * Central bathroom with full amenities plus separate toilet downstairs * Spacious open-plan living and dining with gas heating * Functional kitchen with gas cooktop, oven, fridge, generous storage and bench space * New quality carpets in living and bedrooms, plus new floorboards in kitchen and meals area * Seamless flow from meals area to an undercover deck, perfect for entertaining * Solid brick construction with timeless appeal * Separate laundry with washing machine included * 2 secure garage car spaces plus additional off-road parking with easy front access * Landscaped front and backyards offering space and privacy * Two undercover outdoor entertaining areas for year-round enjoyment * Excellent street appeal in a quiet, leafy setting
Location highlights: * Walking distance to light rail stop * Stroll to Dickson’s vibrant restaurants, cafés, and nightlife * Only 5 minutes’ drive to Canberra CBD * Close to schools, shopping, business hubs, golf course, ANU and more
This home offers the perfect combination of lifestyle and location. Be quick—properties like this are rarely available and always in demand.

residential.headline: Modern Comfort Meets Effortless Living
residential.description:
Separate Title Townhouse – Move-in Ready!
Welcome to a home that blends style, practicality, and low-maintenance living in one smart single-level design. This beautifully presented three-bedroom townhouse offers a fantastic opportunity for downsizers, investors, or families seeking a modern lifestyle without compromise. With its separate title (no body corporate), generous interiors, and seamless flow to a private courtyard, every detail has been thoughtfully planned for ease and comfort.
From the moment you enter, you’ll appreciate the natural light and open layout that makes daily living a breeze. The living spaces are perfect for relaxing or entertaining, while the well-appointed kitchen and quality finishes throughout create a sense of refinement. Step outside to your own private courtyard—ideal for alfresco dining, weekend BBQs, or simply soaking up the sun in your own tranquil space.
Set in a quiet, convenient location close to shops, schools, and public transport, this property provides the best of both worlds—peaceful suburban living with easy access to everything you need. Whether you’re looking to downsize, invest, or secure your next family home, this residence ticks all the boxes.
Key Features: * Bedrooms: Three spacious bedrooms, including a master suite with ensuite. * Bathrooms: Main bathroom plus ensuite for added privacy and convenience. * Parking: Secure double garage with internal access and extra storage space. * Outdoor Space: Private courtyard perfect for entertaining or relaxing. * Design: Single-level layout for comfort and accessibility.
Prime Location: * Schools: Close to reputable local schools. * Shops: Nearby shopping centres and local amenities. * Transport: Convenient access to public transport routes. * Arterial Roads: Easy travel connections to major roads and city centres.
Additional Highlights: * NBN high-speed internet connectivity. * Year-round comfort with heating and cooling. * Energy Efficiency Rating: 6.0
Don’t miss your chance to secure this modern, easy-care home in a sought-after area. Your new lifestyle starts here – enquire today!

residential.headline: Luxury Living with Unrivalled Amenities at The Ivy
residential.description:
Discover refined modern living in Canberra’s most sought-after address – "The Ivy". This elegant two-bedroom residence delivers sophistication, comfort, and breathtaking views across the resort-style pool and surrounding mountain landscape.
Designed for those who appreciate quality, the apartment features a seamless open-plan layout with sunlit living and dining areas flowing onto a private balcony. The designer kitchen offers sleek cabinetry, generous bench space, and premium appliances. Both bedrooms are spacious retreats with abundant natural light, while the bathrooms – including a stylish ensuite – showcase contemporary finishes.
Enjoy year-round comfort with reverse-cycle heating and cooling, secure underground parking, and all the benefits of one of Canberra’s most exclusive complexes.
Residents’ Facilities Include: * Two luxurious swimming pools (indoor and outdoor) * Spa, sauna, and dedicated yoga studio * Fully equipped cardio and weight training gyms * Children’s play area and beautifully landscaped grounds
Features: * Located in the award-winning Ivy development * Expansive double-glazed windows and quality window furnishings * Two spacious bedrooms with built-in robes * Basement car space plus storage cage * Secure building with intercom access * Unbeatable location close to Westfield Woden, Coles, David Jones, and top local eateries

residential.headline: Modern, Spacious & Exceptionally Located Family Home
residential.description:

With multiple living spaces, generous outdoor areas and exceptional car accommodation, this property is sure to stand out on your inspection list.
Designed for practicality and lifestyle, the home features a functional kitchen, open-plan living and dining, plus an expansive rumpus room—ideal for entertaining, working from home, or creating a kids’ retreat. Three well-sized bedrooms, a neatly appointed bathroom and a huge double garage with workshop complete the picture, offering versatility for families, hobbyists or those needing extra storage.

residential.headline: Water Views on Level 4 — Premium 2 Bedroom Living at "The Grande"
residential.description:
Priced to sell - welcome to "The Grande"—a landmark development where refined architecture, exceptional amenity and an unbeatable CBD-lifestyle converge.
The Grande delivers elevated living from the award-winning team at "Fender Katsalidis", with lush landscaping and urban design by "Oculus". Perfectly positioned on the cloverleaf of Allara Street and London Circuit, this residence places you moments from the sparkling shores of "Lake Burley Griffin" on one side and the vibrancy of Canberra City on the other. Here, every convenience, café, restaurant, and cultural precinct is just a stroll away.
This beautifully designed 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom, 1 car apartment sits high on Level 4, capturing serene water views and offering exceptional natural light through expansive floor-to-ceiling glazing. A premium selection of finishes, contemporary architecture, and thoughtfully crafted interiors combine to create a residence that feels both sophisticated and effortlessly comfortable.
Apartment Features: * Floor-to-ceiling double-glazed windows framing beautiful water outlooks * Natural luxurious colour scheme * Reverse-cycle air conditioning for year-round comfort * Energy-efficient LED lighting throughout * Spacious private balcony * Designer kitchen with SMEG appliances * Premium 5-star rated appliances for quality and efficiency * Custom bathroom joinery and full-height tiling
Resident Amenities: * Resort-style outdoor pool with elegant rooftop pavilion * Fully equipped gym and calming yoga studio * Modern co-working space for seamless remote work * Library for reading, study, or hosting a residents’ book club * Residents-only cinema for private screenings and entertainment * Grand central staircase connecting landscaped open spaces * Dedicated pet-wash station * On-site bike storage for effortless commuting

residential.headline: Comfort, Convenience & Outlook in a Prime Calwell Setting
residential.description:
Don’t miss the opportunity to secure this functional and well-located three-bedroom home, perfectly positioned directly opposite the Calwell Neighbourhood Oval and just minutes from Tuggeranong Town Centre.
Offering comfortable living, practical spaces, and a scenic outlook from every room, this home is ideal for families, first-home buyers or investors seeking convenience without compromise. Surrounded by schools, cafés, restaurants, parks, sports fields and shopping, the lifestyle on offer here is both relaxed and connected.
Inside, the home features multiple living zones including an open-plan family room and a separate lounge, complemented by timber flooring through the main living areas and carpeted bedrooms. The functional kitchen is well appointed with a gas cooktop, oven/griller, dishwasher, ample storage and a dedicated meals area.
Year-round comfort is assured with split-system air-conditioning, ducted heating and LED lighting throughout. The bathroom offers modern finishes, while a separate laundry adds everyday practicality.
Outdoors, landscaped gardens frame a welcoming family BBQ area, ideal for entertaining. Additional features include off-road parking, a garden shed for tools, and one undercover car space.
Property Features: * Three bedrooms, one bathroom, two car spaces * Open-plan family room plus separate lounge * Functional kitchen with gas cooktop, oven/griller & dishwasher * Timber flooring to living areas, carpeted bedrooms * Split-system air-conditioning & ducted heating * LED lighting throughout * Modern bathroom and separate laundry * Landscaped gardens with outdoor BBQ area * Garden shed and off-road parking * Popular street with oval directly across the road * Close to transport, shopping, schools, cafés, bars and restaurants
Set in a tightly held and convenient pocket of Calwell, this home represents outstanding value and lifestyle appeal.

residential.headline: Substantial Five-Bedroom Family Home – Extended, Refreshed & Ready
residential.description:
Privately positioned at the rear on a battle-axe block, 11 Winton Place, Holder delivers scale, flexibility and comfort in one of Weston Creek’s most tightly held pockets.
Extended to accommodate larger or growing families, this spacious residence offers five bedrooms, multiple living zones and excellent segregation — all freshly refreshed and ready for its next chapter.
Recently updated throughout, the home has been fully repainted internally, features new carpet in the lounge room, and is complemented by brand new curtains, creating a clean and modern feel from the moment you step inside.
Energy efficiency is a standout feature, with a substantial 13.2kW solar system, double glazing throughout and an excellent 5.5 EER rating, delivering year-round comfort and reduced energy costs, while placing the home ahead of many comparable properties in the area for efficiency and sustainability.
Designed for Real Family Living: * Five generous bedrooms * Two master suites, each with ensuite * Formal living room * Separate family living area with new carpet * Central kitchen overlooking dining and living zones * Dedicated study/home office * 13.2K Solar on roof * Tiles throughout all bedrooms * Updated ensuite to bedroom * Ducted gas heating and cooling inside * Built-in wardrobes to bedrooms * Dishwasher included * Fully fenced yard * Outdoor entertaining area * Broadband (nbn-ready) * Main bathroom with separate WC * Double garage with internal access * Private and quiet battle-axe position

residential.headline: Modern Comfort in the Heart of Coombs
residential.description:
Perfectly positioned in the thriving Molonglo Valley, 3A Woodberry Avenue, Coombs presents an outstanding opportunity to secure a stylish, low-maintenance home in one of Canberra’s most desirable and rapidly growing communities.
Beautifully designed for modern living, this contemporary residence combines sleek finishes, light-filled spaces and practical comfort, making it ideal for first home buyers, down-sizers, or savvy investors seeking a quality property in a prime location.
Step inside and be welcomed by a bright open-plan living and dining area, where elegant floorboards create a warm and inviting atmosphere. The space flows seamlessly into a modern kitchen featuring quality appliances, a gas cooktop and premium finishes, perfect for both everyday living and entertaining.
The home offers three generously sized bedrooms, each with soft carpet underfoot, while the master suite enjoys the added luxury of a private ensuite. Two modern bathrooms service the home with stylish fittings and thoughtful design.
Outside, a private courtyard provides the perfect setting for relaxed outdoor dining, weekend entertaining, or simply enjoying a quiet morning coffee.

Investment Appeal: The property is currently tenanted at $700 per week, providing immediate rental income and security for investors looking to add a quality asset to their portfolio.
Conveniently located just moments from local shops, parks, walking trails and quality schools, this beautifully maintained home offers the perfect blend of lifestyle, convenience and modern design.
Whether you’re looking for a smart investment or a future home in a thriving community, 3A Woody Avenue is an opportunity not to be missed.

residential.headline: Modern Living Backing Nature – Stylish Two-Bedroom Townhouse in Prime Casey Location
residential.description:
Positioned in an unbeatable location within the thriving suburb of Casey, "29 Spratt Court" offers the perfect blend of lifestyle, convenience, and low-maintenance living. With public transport, quality schools, local shops, and a rapidly growing town centre all within easy reach, this property presents an outstanding opportunity for both homeowners and investors alike.
Thoughtfully designed across two levels, this impressive townhouse delivers a practical and comfortable layout. Downstairs features a spacious open-plan living and dining area that seamlessly connects to a generous outdoor courtyard, ideal for entertaining or relaxing. The modern kitchen is well-appointed with quality finishes and functionality in mind, while a cleverly concealed laundry and separate toilet add further convenience.
Upstairs, you will find two generously sized bedrooms, both complete with large built-in wardrobes and an abundance of natural light. The main bathroom is well designed with a large shower, vanity, and toilet, catering perfectly to everyday living.
Set directly opposite natural bushland, the home enjoys a peaceful outlook with open space for children to play and unwind right at your doorstep.
